ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sale occurred */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item type sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost per unit */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the sale */,
  "total_profit" TEXT /* Total profit from the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  "currency_conversion_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item (e.g., 10x5x2 cm) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_types_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales_rep, inventory_manager, financial_analyst) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "two_factor_authentication" INTEGER /* Whether the user has enabled two-factor authentication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the supplier is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the customer is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item type */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the inventory was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)
